title: Podplane cluster config
description: Configuration for a Podplane Kubernetes cluster. This file is the human-authored source of truth used to generate managed OpenTofu/Terraform files.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the JSON Schema for editor validation and completion. Podplane writes a local relative path so config editing works offline.

id.description: Stable cluster slug used in resource names, kubeconfig keys, generated infrastructure, and state locations.

domains.description: DNS zones and providers used by cluster ingress and certificate automation.

pools.description: Named VM pools. Pool names are referenced by subnets and load-balancer listeners.

providers.description: Cloud provider infrastructure configuration. Cluster create currently supports AWS.

issuer_url.description: OIDC issuer URL trusted by the Kubernetes API server for user authentication.

client_id.description: OIDC client ID. Defaults to cluster.id when omitted.

username_claim.description: Token claim used as the Kubernetes username. Defaults to email.

groups_claim.description: Token claim used for Kubernetes group membership. Defaults to groups.

signing_algs.description: Allowed OIDC signing algorithms. Passed to kube-apiserver at runtime; vmconfig defaults to RS256 when omitted.

ca_cert.description: Custom OIDC CA certificate as inline PEM, an http(s) URL, or a local file path.

server.description: ACME directory URL used for ingress certificates.

zone.description: Exact ingress apex used by the cluster.

load_balancer.description: Provider load-balancer key. Defaults to main.

account.description: Cloud account identifier for this DNS provider.

region.description: Cloud region for DNS provider API calls when applicable.

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN used for DNS automation.

secret_provider_class_name.description: Kubernetes SecretProviderClass name for DNS credentials.

secret_name.description: Kubernetes Secret name for DNS credentials.

secret_key.description: Key within the Kubernetes Secret for DNS credentials.

arch.description: CPU architecture for VMs in this pool.

instance_type.description: Provider instance type for VMs in this pool.

size.description: Desired number of VMs in this pool.

disk_size.description: Root disk size for VMs in this pool, in GiB.

kind.description: Infrastructure provider kind. Cluster create currently supports aws.

account.description: Provider account identifier, such as an AWS account ID.

tags.description: Tags applied to supported provider resources.

zones.description: Availability zone or shard map. Each key is a provider zone name.

load_balancers.description: Named load balancers referenced by domains and Kubernetes API configuration.

buckets.description: Additional provider bucket names used by the cluster.

roles.description: Additional provider roles keyed by role name.

default_provider.description: Default Podplane Secrets provider name used by podplane secret and templates.

providers.description: Named Podplane Secrets providers. Only safe provider-selection metadata belongs here; credentials are configured on the operator.

kind.description: Upstream Secrets Store CSI provider slug.

key_prefix.description: Optional backend key prefix for this provider. Defaults to cluster.id.

object_type.description: AWS Secrets Store CSI objectType used for template rendering.

region.description: AWS region used for provider API calls.

project_id.description: GCP project ID used for SecretProviderClass rendering.

location.description: Optional GCP regional Secret Manager location.

address.description: Vault/OpenBao server address used by operator/runtime configuration.

ca_cert.description: Optional PEM CA bundle for the Vault/OpenBao endpoint.

auth_path.description: Vault/OpenBao Kubernetes auth mount path used by the operator. Defaults to auth/kubernetes.

operator_role.description: Vault/OpenBao role used by the operator service account. Defaults to podplane-operator.

id.description: Existing VPC ID. When set, Podplane uses the existing VPC.

v4cidr.description: IPv4 CIDR for a new VPC.

v6cidr.description: IPv6 CIDR for a new VPC, or auto to request provider-assigned IPv6.

pool.description: Pool name scheduled into this subnet.

services.description: Infrastructure services placed in this subnet.

id.description: Existing subnet ID. When set, Podplane uses the existing subnet.

v4cidr.description: IPv4 CIDR for a new subnet.

v6cidr.description: IPv6 CIDR for a new subnet, or auto.

public.description: Whether the provider load balancer is internet-facing.

subnets.description: Subnet role in which the provider load balancer is placed.

listeners.description: Listeners exposed by the load balancer.

target_port.description: Port on target VMs. Defaults to port.

pool.description: Pool whose VMs are registered with this listener's target group.

buckets.description: Bucket names this role can access.

api_port.description: Public Kubernetes API port. Defaults to 6443.

api_load_balancer.description: Optional provider load-balancer key used for managed API connectivity and DNS.

name.description: Podplane seed to use when creating the initial Netsy snapshot.

version.description: Seed version recorded when the cluster was created.

digest.description: Expected SHA-512 digest of the seed snapshot.

enabled.description: Render platform component image references through the configured image mirror.

hostname.description: Advanced shared-mirror hostname override. Defaults to cluster.registry.hostname.

prefix.description: Advanced mirror path-prefix override. Leading and trailing slashes are ignored; defaults to mirror.

hostname.description: Cluster registry hostname used by node-local Zot, podplane push, and optional Docker-compatible ingress.

enabled.description: Enable optional Docker-compatible registry ingress and token-service routing. Disabled by default.

name.description: Name of a Flux Git credentials Secret in the platform-components namespace.
